subject: How was your session?
html:

Your mentor {{mentor_name}} marked your session as completed — we're really glad we could introduce you two!

If you have a minute, please leave a short review and tell us how it went. Feedback means a lot to mentors and helps us make OpenMentor better.

Thank you, and come back any time! ❤️
